title: Star Wars Masterpiece Edition
content:
{{Top|rwm|leg|ref|italics=1}}
[[File:C-3PO_Tales_of_the_Golden_Droid.jpg|thumb|''[[C-3PO: Tales of the Golden Droid]]'']]
The '''''Star Wars Masterpiece Edition''''' is a series of three hardcover reference books published by [[Chronicle Books]]. Each comes in a huge box that contains the book and a 12" collector figure made by [[Hasbro]].

The books showcase different characters from the ''Star Wars'' movies: [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[Aurra Sing/Legends|Aurra Sing]]. They include information about the development of the characters, their in-universe biography and merchandising products.

==Media==
===Installments===
*''[[Anakin Skywalker: The Story of Darth Vader]]'' by [[Stephen J. Sansweet]]
*''[[C-3PO: Tales of the Golden Droid]]'' by [[Daniel Wallace]] and [[Josh Ling]]
*''[[Aurra Sing: Dawn of the Bounty Hunters]]'' by [[Ryder Windham]] and [[Josh Ling]]
